description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is primarily white with blue and red accent stripes running along the body and wings, giving it a sporty appearance. The nose features a red propeller and a blue-tipped spinner, while the cockpit area is forward-mounted with two visible windows. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with matching color accents. The overall design suggests a light general aviation aircraft suitable for short flights or training purposes.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a white fuselage and blue-red accents, featuring a forward cockpit and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red propeller, blue-tipped nose, forward cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with red and blue accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the high-wing placement, fixed landing gear, and the blue stripe running along the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the high-wing configuration, fixed landing gear, and the propeller at the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with two visible windows, likely single or dual seat.
